name: HITCFederatedSummary
title: HITC Federated Patient Summary Operation
description: Decomposes a patient-summary request into institution-specific subqueries, merges results, and returns a canonical Bundle.
purpose: Defines the requirements contract for the low-latency federated query workflow; performance targets remain prospective.
comment: The operation contract does not prescribe a particular patient-matching or cache implementation.

parameter.name: identifier
parameter.documentation: Patient business identifier(s) used for probabilistic or deterministic matching.

parameter.name: section
parameter.documentation: Requested summary sections, such as medications, problems, allergies, labs, or procedures.

parameter.name: result
parameter.documentation: Fused canonical patient-summary Bundle. The returned Bundle SHALL conform to https://example.org/fhir/li-xinyang-interop-r4/StructureDefinition/hitc-exchange-bundle.
